package rulefixtures

// scenario for template_parse_in_hot_path: html/template or text/template parse calls observed on request-style paths instead of startup-time caching.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule370PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario370Positive(records []Rule370PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
